title: GuidancePlan
description: The opaque guidance primitive returned to clients. It conveys SELECTION (which seeds, what action, a coarse priority) but no proprietary tuning signals: no signal names, no numeric signal values, no formulas, and no per-seed count. Plans are deterministic and idempotent per (run, policy_version); items are returned in the server selector order. additionalProperties is false at every level so no signal field can be smuggled in.

plan_id.description: Stable identifier for this plan. The backend emits a non-empty string up to 128 characters.

policy_version.description: Opaque version tag of the server-side selection policy that produced this plan. Rotated periodically; not client-interpretable.

items.description: Selected seeds with their action and coarse priority. May be empty, for example when a degenerate or too-small run yields no selected seeds.

plan_budget.description: Plan-level generation budget. This is the client's requested budget, echoed and capped by the server, not a signal-derived per-seed number.

total_generations.description: Maximum number of artifacts the client may generate from this plan in total.

plan_token.description: Opaque, server-signed token binding tenant, project, run, policy_version, item-set, and expiry. Not client-interpretable; echoed back unchanged on guidance-results.

expires_at.description: UTC timestamp after which the plan_token is no longer accepted.
